sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36675" key="e)calu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξᾰλύω</orth>, <sense id="n36675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐξαλέομαι, μόρον</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg007.perseus-grc1:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Bacch.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
